examples: Languages in East Asia tend to have tonal vowels, and those of the north-eastern Caucasus are known for consonantal complexity: Ubykh has 78 consonant sounds.
Today Georgia has reinvented itself as the star of the Caucasus.
A fresh spate of killings hit Chechnya, in Russia's north Caucasus.
One of the many faultlines that runs through the Caucasus is a geopolitical one.
Many refugees from the Caucasus conflict received passports or refugee status in surrounding countries.
